channel.title: morningNewsLastSection
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsLastSection, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Dungeon Crawler Carl audiobooks coming to libraries
item.description: Popular series exits Audible exclusivity, arrives on Libby.

item.title: Best BIPOC books of April
item.description: New BIPOC releases include tales of 2000s Brooklyn, gothic Japan, and more.

item.title: Book Riot's daily deals for April 27, 2026
item.description: Deals on books about fox spirits, Alaskan landscapes, and haunting tales.

item.title: BIPOC and queer romantasies with fae
item.description: Diverse romantasies feature magical heists and mythology-inspired magic.
